revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
Immanuelle moved page [[Talk:縣神社]] to [[Talk:Agata Shrine]]
Moving from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects A]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "Automatic wikipedia redirects" to "Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:pages to be overwritten]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects"
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Talk:縣神社]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]][[Category:pages to be overwritten]][[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects A]]

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Wikipedia overwrites
Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (no ja/en source); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-02-25 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Initial import == <!-- No source talk page found on ja/en Wikipedia at migration time. -->
<!-- Dummy comment to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page. -->

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Agata_Shrine here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{talk page header}}
